segments.text: Good morning everyone, thanks for joining the Team Sync.
Let's start with a status update on the Alpha project.
The Alpha rollout is on track for next week.
Beta testing wrapped up yesterday with no major issues.
We still need feedback from the Gamma pilot group.
Gamma numbers look promising so far.
Any blockers before we move to the next topic?
Great, let's wrap up and reconvene tomorrow.
